Home.title: EasyToolHub - Free Online Tools & Expert Reviews
Home.heroSubtitle: Simple, fast, and free online calculators, converters, and tools. No sign-up required. Works on any device.
Home.popularToolsDesc: Choose from our collection of free online tools below.
Home.why1Desc: All tools work right in your browser. No downloads, no fees.
Home.why2Desc: Every tool works perfectly on phones, tablets, and desktops.
Home.why3Desc: Your data stays on your device. Nothing is stored or tracked.
Home.ctaDesc: Browse our full collection of free tools and expert product reviews.

Tools.title: All Tools
Tools.description: Browse our complete collection of free online calculators, converters, and text tools.
Tools.subtitle: Free online tools that work right in your browser. No sign-up required.

percentage.title: Percentage Calculator
percentage.description: Calculate percentages, percentage change, and find what percent one number is of another.
percentage.subtitle: Calculate percentages quickly and easily.
percentage.hintFind: What percent of B is A?
percentage.hintChange: Percent change from A to B
percentage.howToTitle: How to Use This Percentage Calculator
percentage.howToDesc: Our percentage calculator supports three common operations:
percentage.findDesc: What percent is one number of another? (e.g., what percent of 200 is 50? Answer: 25%)
percentage.ofDesc: Find what a given percentage of a number equals. (e.g., 25% of 200 = 50)
percentage.changeDesc: Calculate the increase or decrease between two numbers as a percentage.

bmi.title: BMI Calculator
bmi.description: Calculate your Body Mass Index and find out if you're in a healthy weight range.
bmi.subtitle: Calculate your Body Mass Index to check if you're in a healthy weight range.
bmi.understandingDesc: BMI is a simple measure that uses your height and weight to work out if you're a healthy weight. It's a useful screening tool, but it doesn't diagnose body fatness or health. Always consult a healthcare professional for a complete assessment.

wordCounter.title: Word Counter
wordCounter.description: Count words, characters, sentences, and paragraphs in any text instantly.
wordCounter.subtitle: Count words, characters, sentences, and paragraphs in any text.
wordCounter.placeholder: Type or paste your text here...
wordCounter.whyDesc: Whether you're writing an essay, a blog post, or social media content, keeping track of your word and character count is essential. Many platforms have strict limits — Twitter posts must be under 280 characters, and many SEO tools recommend blog posts of at least 1,500 words.
wordCounter.feature2: Separate character count with and without spaces
wordCounter.feature4: Works entirely in your browser — no data is sent anywhere

ageCalculator.title: Age Calculator
ageCalculator.description: Calculate your exact age in years, months, and days between any two dates.
ageCalculator.subtitle: Find out your exact age in years, months, and days.
ageCalculator.howDesc1: Our age calculator determines your exact age by counting the full years, months, and days between your date of birth and today. It accounts for leap years and varying month lengths to give you a precise result.
ageCalculator.howDesc2: This tool is helpful for age verification, health and fitness tracking, or just satisfying your curiosity about exactly how old you are!

unitConverter.title: Unit Converter
unitConverter.description: Convert between different units of length, weight, temperature, volume, and area.
unitConverter.subtitle: Convert between common units of measurement.

discount.title: Discount Calculator
discount.description: Calculate the final price after a discount and see how much you save.
discount.subtitle: Find out how much you save with a discount.

tipCalculator.title: Tip Calculator
tipCalculator.description: Calculate tip amounts and split the bill among friends easily.
tipCalculator.subtitle: Calculate tip and split the bill with ease.

loanCalculator.title: Loan Calculator
loanCalculator.description: Calculate monthly loan payments and total interest for any loan amount.
loanCalculator.subtitle: Estimate your monthly loan payments and total interest.

averageCalculator.title: Average Calculator
averageCalculator.description: Calculate mean, median, sum, min, and max for any set of numbers.
averageCalculator.subtitle: Compute the mean, median, and more from your numbers.
averageCalculator.inputLabel: Enter numbers (comma, space, or newline separated)

timeZoneConverter.title: Time Zone Converter
timeZoneConverter.description: Convert time between different time zones worldwide.
timeZoneConverter.subtitle: Convert date and time between time zones.
timeZoneConverter.timeDiffSame: <blue>{from}</blue> and <blue>{to}</blue> are in the same time zone

currencyConverter.title: Currency Converter
currencyConverter.description: Convert between currencies using up-to-date exchange rates.
currencyConverter.subtitle: Convert amounts between major world currencies.
currencyConverter.disclaimer: Exchange rates sourced from European Central Bank reference rates, updated daily.

romanNumeral.title: Roman Numeral Converter
romanNumeral.description: Convert numbers to Roman numerals and Roman numerals back to numbers.
romanNumeral.subtitle: Convert between numbers and Roman numerals.

numberBase.title: Number Base Converter
numberBase.description: Convert numbers between binary, octal, decimal, and hexadecimal bases.
numberBase.subtitle: Convert numbers between binary, octal, decimal, and hex.

passwordGenerator.title: Password Generator
passwordGenerator.description: Generate strong, random passwords with customizable character sets.
passwordGenerator.subtitle: Create strong, random passwords instantly.

loremIpsum.title: Lorem Ipsum Generator
loremIpsum.description: Generate placeholder text for your designs and mockups.
loremIpsum.subtitle: Generate Lorem Ipsum placeholder text.

caseConverter.title: Case Converter
caseConverter.description: Convert text between uppercase, lowercase, title case, camelCase, and more.
caseConverter.subtitle: Transform text between different letter cases.
caseConverter.title: Title Case

urlEncoder.title: URL Encoder / Decoder
urlEncoder.description: Encode or decode URLs and query strings for safe web usage.
urlEncoder.subtitle: URL-encode or decode any text.
urlEncoder.inputPlaceholder: Type or paste your text here...

calorieCalculator.title: Calorie Calculator
calorieCalculator.description: Calculate your daily calorie needs based on BMR and activity level.
calorieCalculator.subtitle: Estimate your daily calorie requirements.
calorieCalculator.bmrDesc: Calories your body burns at complete rest
calorieCalculator.tdeeDesc: Calories you need per day including activity

dueDateCalculator.title: Due Date Calculator
dueDateCalculator.description: Calculate pregnancy due date based on last menstrual period (Naegele's rule).
dueDateCalculator.subtitle: Estimate pregnancy due date and current trimester.
dueDateCalculator.disclaimer: This is an estimate based on Naegele's rule. Always consult your healthcare provider for medical advice.

dateDifference.title: Date Difference Calculator
dateDifference.description: Calculate the exact difference between two dates in days, weeks, months, and years.
dateDifference.subtitle: Find the duration between any two dates.

whatToEat.title: What to Eat
whatToEat.description: Can't decide what to eat? Pick a random dish from 140 meals across 7 countries.
whatToEat.subtitle: Can't decide what to eat? Let us pick a random dish from around the world for you.
whatToEat.placeholder: Click the button above to discover a delicious dish!

Blog.title: Reviews & Guides
Blog.description: Expert reviews and guides on the best productivity tools, software, and equipment.
Blog.subtitle: Honest, in-depth reviews of the best tools and products to boost your productivity.

About.title: About Us
About.description: Learn more about EasyToolHub - your free resource for online tools and expert product reviews.
About.heading: About EasyToolHub
About.p1: EasyToolHub was created to provide free, easy-to-use online tools and honest product reviews to help people make better decisions.
About.p2: Whether you need to calculate a percentage, check your BMI, or find the best productivity software for your team, we have you covered. All our tools are free to use, require no registration, and work on any device.
About.missionDesc: We believe that useful tools and trustworthy information should be freely accessible to everyone. Our mission is to build the most comprehensive collection of online utilities while providing well-researched reviews that help our readers make informed choices.
About.moneyDesc1: EasyToolHub is reader-supported. When you click on some of the links in our reviews and make a purchase, we may earn a small commission at no extra cost to you. This never influences our reviews — we always recommend what we believe is best for our readers. See our

Contact.title: Contact Us
Contact.description: Get in touch with EasyToolHub. We'd love to hear from you.
Contact.heading: Contact Us
Contact.intro: Have a question, suggestion, or want to report an issue? We'd love to hear from you.
Contact.emailText: You can reach us by email at:
Contact.adDesc: Interested in advertising on EasyToolHub? Reach out for our media kit and rates.
Contact.contentDesc: Have an idea for a tool or a product you'd like us to review?

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.description: EasyToolHub privacy policy - how we handle your data and cookies.
Privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
Privacy.s1Desc: EasyToolHub does not collect personal information directly. However, we use third-party services that may collect certain information:
Privacy.s1Item1: Google Analytics: collects anonymized usage data (pages visited, time on site, browser type) to help us improve our content.
Privacy.s1Item2part1: Google AdSense: uses cookies to serve personalized ads based on your browsing history. You can opt out at
Privacy.s2Desc: We use essential cookies for site functionality and third-party cookies for analytics and advertising. You can disable cookies in your browser settings, but some features may not work properly.
Privacy.s3Desc: We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information to outside parties. This does not include trusted third parties who assist us in operating our website (such as Google Analytics and AdSense), as long as those parties agree to keep this information confidential.
Privacy.s4Desc: If you are a resident of the European Economic Area (EEA), you have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. You also have the right to object to or restrict certain processing. To exercise these rights, please contact us.
Privacy.s5Desc: Our website is not intended for children under 13 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13.
Privacy.s6Desc: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please

Affiliate.title: Affiliate Disclosure
Affiliate.description: How EasyToolHub earns commissions through affiliate links - transparent disclosure in compliance with FTC guidelines.
Affiliate.heading: Affiliate Disclosure
Affiliate.intro: In compliance with the FTC guidelines, please assume the following about all links, posts, and content on this site:
Affiliate.linksDesc: Some of the links on EasyToolHub are affiliate links. This means that if you click on the link and purchase an item or sign up for a service, we may receive a commission at no additional cost to you.
Affiliate.honestyDesc: We only recommend products and services that we believe will provide value to our readers. Compensation never influences our reviews, rankings, or recommendations. Our editorial content is not influenced by advertisers or affiliate partnerships.
Affiliate.amazonDesc: EasyToolHub is a participant in the Amazon Services LLC Associates Program, an affiliate advertising program designed to provide a means for sites to earn advertising fees by advertising and linking to Amazon.com.
Affiliate.questionsDesc: If you have any questions about our affiliate relationships, please
